PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionCallImpl(EXPRESSION_CALL)
    PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
      PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
      PsiElement(])(']')
    PsiElement(.)('.')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionCallImpl(EXPRESSION_CALL)
    PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
    PsiElement(.)('.')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiElement(()('(')
    PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionCallImpl(EXPRESSION_CALL)
    PsiPuppetExpressionCallImpl(EXPRESSION_CALL)
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('array')
      PsiElement(.)('.')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('filter')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
        PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
          PsiElement(|)('|')
          PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
          PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=~)('=~')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
              PsiElement(REGEX)('/^0-9+$/')
          PsiElement(})('}')
    PsiElement(.)('.')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('map')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
      PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionMultiplicativeImpl(EXPRESSION_MULTIPLICATIVE)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(*)('*')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionCallImpl(EXPRESSION_CALL)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('array')
    PsiElement(.)('.')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('func')
    PsiElement(()('(')
    PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
    PsiElement(,)(',')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
    PsiElement())(')')
